			<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_15_0_1b500480_1202183101031_557694_6012' name='TemperatureRegulation'>
				<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_15_5EAPbeta1_899027d_1211257210718_618519_6403' body='Energy supply are not shown on the diagram; devices are supposed to use electricity as power source'/>
				<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_15_5EAPbeta2_1b500480_1213166954798_516782_11222' body='&lt;html&gt;&#10;  &lt;head&gt;&#10;    &#10;  &lt;/head&gt;&#10;  &lt;body&gt;&#10;    &lt;p&gt;&#10;      This model is a general case of regulated systems. Classical heat &#10;      transfers occur only through convection, conduction, radiation, or any &#10;      combination of these.&lt;br&gt;Therefore, this model shows only the Heat flows &#10;      from the Cooling/HeatingSystems to the Air inside the Room, and between &#10;      the Air inside the Room and the environment.&#10;    &lt;/p&gt;&#10;  &lt;/body&gt;&#10;&lt;/html&gt;&#10;'/>
				<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 19.0 beta'>
					<modelExtension>

				<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_15_1_1b500480_1205726984666_586353_5567' body='The steady state error should be included within a specified range'/>

			<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_15_0_1b500480_1202379511984_593995_7913' name='Evaluation'>
				<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 19.0 beta'>
					<modelExtension/>
				</xmi:Extension>
				<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_15_0_1b500480_1202379655156_695704_7943' name='heating'>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_15_0_1b500480_1202379511984_593995_7913'/>
					<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_15_0_1b500480_1202379655156_711577_7944'>
						<body>if i&gt;0 then heating=1 and cooling=0</body>
					</specification>
				</ownedRule>
				<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_15_0_1b500480_1202379739234_369943_7945' name='cooling'>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_15_0_1b500480_1202379511984_593995_7913'/>
					<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_15_0_1b500480_1202379739234_504314_7946'>
						<body>if i&lt;0 then heating=0 and cooling=1</body>
					</specification>
				</ownedRule>
				<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_15_0_1b500480_1202379763921_890807_7947' name='no cooling AND no heating'>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_15_0_1b500480_1202379511984_593995_7913'/>
					<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_15_0_1b500480_1202379763921_558549_7948'>
						<body>if i=0 then heating=0 and cooling=0</body>
					</specification>
				</ownedRule>
				<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Port' xmi:id='_15_0_1b500480_1202379565890_50374_7934' name='i' visibility='private' aggregation='composite'>

					</type>

				</node>

				</node>
				<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_15_0_24400562_1202289934421_3831_4645' name='Ask the current &#10;room temperature' visibility='public'>

				</node>

				</node>

				</node>
